outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive total GEX suppresses volatility. Spot testing gamma flip - directional breakout likely on breach.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility regime: negative 0DTE GEX (-0.15B) amplifies moves. Price pinned at Max Pain 597. Sharp directional breakout likely if 595 or 605 breaks.
outlook.summary: Market compressed at 0DTE Max Pain 597 under negative gamma. RESONANCE resistance at 615 across all expirations defines upside cap. CONFLUENCE support at 575 (0DTE+MONTHLY) anchors downside. Extreme VOL/OI ratios (5.59x at 596) confirm active MM pinning. Break of 595 targets 585/575; break of 605 targets 615.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across ALL 3 expirations: 0DTE (9423 OI), WEEKLY (3171 OI), MONTHLY (28872 OI). Ultimate upside target. Reverse smirk skew (0.66) confirms bullish euphoria at resistance.
